theme_and_archetype.rationale: Citizens and admins need trust and clarity. The UI should feel like a premium tech product (like Swiggy/Uber) rather than a clunky government portal. We use a dark-first design with deep navy/charcoal backgrounds, glassmorphism, and vivid accent colors for focus and status.

fonts.import_instructions: Add to index.html or global css via Google Fonts.

rules: Headings must use 'Outfit' with tight letter spacing.
Never exceed text-6xl for hero headings.
Labels must be uppercase with wide tracking.
Body text must use 'Plus Jakarta Sans' for clean data legibility.

colors.tailwind_config_instructions: Update the dark mode CSS variables in index.css to reflect these hex codes. Use deep midnight blues instead of generic grays. Primary button colors should strictly use the primary accent.

marketing_pages.grid: Bento Grid (Mode A: Tetris) with asymmetrical spans (col-span-8, col-span-4).
marketing_pages.spacing: Use gap-8 to gap-12. Generous padding like py-24 for sections.

dashboards.grid: Control Room Grid (Mode B). Dense data, 3 or 4 columns.
dashboards.spacing: Tight gaps (gap-4 or gap-6). Cards must have pure alignments with h-full so they stretch and match heights.

rules: Avoid 100% symmetrical standard Bootstrap columns on marketing pages.
Containers with borders must have internal padding (p-6 or p-8) to prevent text collision.

glassmorphism.usage: Sticky Headers, Floating Navs, Notifications, Key Hover States.

cards.implementation: bg-[#131722] border border-white/10 rounded-2xl hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all duration-300 hover:shadow-2xl hover:border-white/20

framer_motion.page_transitions: Fade and slight Y-axis slide (y: 20 -> 0) on mount.
framer_motion.scroll_animations: Staggered fade-ins for feature grids using viewport triggers.
framer_motion.hover_effects: Cards lift slightly. Buttons glow via box-shadow or gradient tracing.

microinteractions.buttons: Active states must scale down slightly (scale: 0.98).
microinteractions.icons: Use Phosphor Icons (duotone) for premium hover effects.

component_rules.forms_and_inputs: Use Shadcn customized components. Inputs should have bg-white/5, border-white/10, focus:ring-primary.
component_rules.buttons: Rounded corners (rounded-full for marketing CTA, rounded-lg for dashboard). Use gradients cautiously on main CTAs (e.g., bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 to-indigo-600).
component_rules.charts: Use Recharts (via Shadcn). Ensure grid lines are low opacity (stroke='rgba(255,255,255,0.05)').
component_rules.logo: Implement as an SVG stack: A modern location pin merging with a subtle shield icon, against a minimal city skyline vector. Text: 'CivicConnect'.

hero_background.description: Dark modern city skyline at night to give a smart city vibe.

issue_pothole.description: Street damage / pothole representation for sample reports.

community_success.description: Clean street or nature representing a fixed community issue.

media_and_assets.rules: Overlay hero images with max bg-black/60 to let the background breathe. Text must maintain APCA contrast.

instructions_to_main_agent: Read this entire file and apply its design system exactly as specified.
Do NOT use 'Inter', use 'Outfit' for headers and 'Plus Jakarta Sans' for body.
Enforce dark mode first. Update index.css with the exact colors provided.
Use framer-motion for smooth staggered list entry and card hovers.
For the UI components, rely on Shadcn UI but heavily overwrite the styling to match the premium 'Glassmorphism' and 'Charcoal' aesthetic.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing.
Build the multi-step form for reporting with clear progress indicators.
Do not use placeholder image services like via.placeholder.com. Use the Unsplash URLs provided.
